name: Skill Multi-Publisher
description: One-command publish a Claude Code/OpenClaw skill to multiple marketplaces: GitHub (npx skills), ClawHub, and npm. Validates SKILL.md and auto-generates missing files.
review: Useful multi-marketplace publisher for skill authors. Clean security posture, genuinely unique utility. SKILL.md frontmatter is missing author and triggers fields — functional despite this gap.
notes: SKILL.md is missing `author` and `triggers` frontmatter fields. Verify marketplace URLs before use. Conditional approval — author encouraged to fix frontmatter.
